changeSet.author: trainingsplan
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_training_entries (competition_registration_id, training_id, training_date, week_number, completed, completion_status) SELECT cr.id, t.id, t.training_date, t.week_number, COALESCE(t.completed, false), t.completion_status FROM competition_registrations cr JOIN training_weeks tw ON tw.competition_id = cr.competition_id JOIN trainings t ON t.training_week_id = tw.id AND t.training_plan_id = cr.training_plan_id WHERE cr.training_plan_id IS NOT NULL AND t.training_date IS NOT NULL;
